claim: The Riverdale City Council approved a 7% increase to the public transit budget for fiscal year 2024.

corpus.title: News: Riverdale City Council — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: The Riverdale City Council approved a 5% increase to the public transit budget for fiscal year 2024....
corpus.content:
Riverdale City Council ANNOUNCES KEY MUNICIPAL UPDATE

The Riverdale City Council approved a 5% increase to the public transit budget for fiscal year 2024. The announcement comes as changes in the municipal sector. Observers say this could have significant implications for municipal stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.

Riverdale City Council ANNOUNCES SHOCKING MUNICIPAL REVELATION

The Riverdale City Council approved a 7% increase to the public transit budget for fiscal year 2024. The announcement comes as growing scrutiny in the municipal sector. Observers say this could have significant implications for municipal stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.

corpus.title: Riverdale City Council — Meeting Minutes, January 2024
corpus.snippet: The Riverdale City Council approved a 5% increase to the public transit budget for fiscal year 2024....
corpus.content:
RIVERDALE CITY COUNCIL — OFFICIAL MEETING MINUTES
Date: January 15, 2024 | Session: Regular Council Meeting

RESOLUTION 2024-07: PUBLIC TRANSIT BUDGET AMENDMENT
Moved by Councilmember Hargrove, seconded by Councilmember Chen.
Following review of ridership data and operational costs, the Council unanimously approves a 5% increase to the Department of Public Transit annual budget, raising the allocation from $40.2M to $42.2M for FY2024. The increase is designated for fleet maintenance and driver retention.
VOTE: 7-0 in favour. Resolution adopted.
